description: Creates a 3D line through a point with given direction ratios (a, b, c).
utility: Create a 3D line from a point and direction ratios

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: Starting point as a point3d variable or 3 inline coordinates

alternates.description: Line through point3d P with direction ratios 2, -1, 4

examples.scenario: Line through a point with direction ratios
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P = point3d(G, 1, 2, 3)
L = directionline3d(G, P, 2, -1, 4)

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L = directionline3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1, c(teal))
